hotel_name: Khách sạn Gia Huy Riverside Hội An (Gia Huy Riverside Hotel Hoi An)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: khách sạn cúp điện, máy nổ không chạy. Phòng có con nít
reviews.response:
Thân gửi anh/chị,

Trước tiên, khách sạn rất xin lỗi vì trải nghiệm chưa trọn vẹn mà anh/chị đã gặp phải trong thời gian lưu trú tại Serene Riverside Hotel Hoi An.

Sự cố mất điện xảy ra là tình huống bất khả kháng và ngoài mong muốn. Dù máy phát không hoạt động kịp thời, đội ngũ khách sạn đã cố gắng hỗ trợ nhanh nhất có thể, đặc biệt khi biết trong phòng có trẻ nhỏ – điều mà chúng tôi luôn ưu tiên quan tâm.

Chúng tôi ghi nhận những bất tiện anh/chị gặp phải và đã chủ động hỗ trợ, lắng nghe phản hồi cũng như đồng ý hoàn tiền theo thoả thuận, thể hiện thiện chí và mong muốn bù đắp phần nào sự không hài lòng của anh/chị.

Rất mong anh/chị có thể thông cảm cho tình huống ngoài ý muốn này. Chúng tôi sẽ tiếp tục cải thiện hệ thống kỹ thuật và dịch vụ để không xảy ra trường hợp tương tự.

Hy vọng trong tương lai, Serene Riverside Hoi An vẫn có cơ hội được chào đón anh/chị quay trở lại với trải nghiệm tốt đẹp hơn.

Trân trọng,
Bộ phận chăm sóc khách hàng
Serene Riverside Hotel Hoi An

reviews.title: Not the best place, but overall good value for money.  The staff's helpfulness made up for the prop.
reviews.positives:
Staff was very helpful and accomodating.
The property location was good.
reviews.negatives:
There was construction going on at the property - there was a lot of dust.
The pictures did not quite match the property. 
The gym room was under contruction and not conducive to use.

reviews.title: It wasn’t a pleasant stay
reviews.text:
Traffic noise was terrible, the staff was kind to change a room on 1 floor higher but it was downgraded without bathtub and balcony, and the noise didn’t get much better, so all the rooms are facing river and road, so please be prepared for the noise from road traffic and boats.
I arrived cold and wet, got sick and asked the staff for ginger. He found me 2pieces both molded. I went into the kitchen and saw the trash was staying overnight with bugs flying around. The next day morning saw a mouse right in front of the breakfast room.
The first night, bathtub was dirty unusable. I couldn’t be bothered searching another place to stay when I’m Hoi an which now I think it was a mistake, as even after changing room, the room was so wet and when I left most of my clothes were wet. And in there was also larvae in my room.

The staff was trying to be helpful but they weren’t helpful, changing room can’t fix everything. I didn’t feel they rly cared about my wellbeing.

reviews.title: A peaceful setting by the river & close enough to walk into the Ancient town.
reviews.positives: The pool area & gardens were a great design & also had the chance to sit by the riverside gardens too. The breakfast was ample with limited choice - a meal & 2 drinks- service & eating area was good. The location was about 12 minute walk to the edge of the old town.  We were on the 3 rd floor - no lift but staff helped carry our bags. We had a lovely view of the river.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Very small old renovated hotel. Room is cozy, and kinda smelly and humid when u first enter the room. Towels are of cheap quality. There are no elevators. Staffs are friendly and helpful. I would give it a 2 star hotel.

reviews.title: Beautiful place to relax in Hoi An
reviews.positives: The property is beautiful, especially the pool area and the restaurant which faces the river. It’s just a short walk to town so that is perfect! The staff is super helpful and friendly, especially Eric who was able to help us with all our questions and organize a great tour for us!
reviews.negatives: My only complaint is that our room was on the 4th floor with no elevator, but they kindly helped us bring our suitcases up :)

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text: Friendly staff. Cold showers so moved to another unit, plumbers not called, but room still let out the following day.  Toilet not always flushing. Breakfast fair. 20 min walk from main tourist area.

reviews.title: Budget friendly boutique hotel
reviews.positives: Location was fairly convenient and the hotel was facing the beach. It is around a 15 minutes casual walk to Ancient town. Plenty of Restaurants on the way to Ancient town. Hotel serves limited but decent breakfast. Staff were excellent. This is a boutique hotel. There is a small swimming pool, tables by the beach and it gives a family run feel:)

reviews.title: Too new to be established.
reviews.text:
The staff are lovely, caring and they put lots of efforts to make us feel comfortable but rooms need more time to complete. Due to that,hand basin is still missing many items (e.g towel’s ring…). In a toilet area, bidet’s pipe was leaking and black paint still remain on the toilet’s floor.
Room is devided  by curtain between toilet and bedroom (see through), no airflow in the toilet or bathroom. No dim light, so either very bright or be in the darkness. Workers kept working, talking, smoking in front of our door preventing us entry or exit.
Breakfast is simple but acceptable.
Pool is very small.
Dust and leaves and heat came to reception area. 
Cabs refused to take us because it is close to city to drive but  too far to walk.
We still recommend this place as it is truly serenity. Perhaps you can choose an old corner…
We wish to thank the staff for their kind help throughout our stay.
T&T Baumann
reviews.response:
Dear T&T Baumann,

On behalf of the entire team at Serene Riverside Hotel Hoi An, we sincerely thank you for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to provide such honest, detailed, and thoughtful feedback.

We’re truly grateful for your kind words regarding our friendly and attentive staff. Ensuring our guests feel welcome and comfortable is always our top priority.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you experienced during your stay. Your comments regarding the unfinished room facilities—such as the missing towel ring, leaking bidet, remaining construction marks, lack of ventilation, and lighting—have all been noted with seriousness. As a newly launched property, we recognize that some areas still require fine-tuning, and we are actively working to resolve these issues as quickly as possible.

We’re also sorry that ongoing construction and workers outside your room affected your privacy and ease of access. We have addressed this with the contrac

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: They helped us order laundry clraning and was completed in 2 hrs. They helped us with airport transportation.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Room is outdated especially bathroom smells of urine

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Staff were exceptionally warm, friendly and helpful, including supporting us with language, phones, transport etc. Special thanks to Tina, Eric, Hung and ever enthusiastic Truong!! Breakfast was generous, the pool was great, and location was an easy walk to the old town.

reviews.title: Serene Riverside Hotwl
reviews.text: Lights are burnt out.  Bathroom not clean.  Room needs to be updated.  No plave to put luggage.  Some staff friendly.  Be prepared to walk to old town.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Really wonderful staff, and the bed was very comfy. The pool area is adorable.
reviews.negatives: Many little things need some extra love. My room had a broken window, my TV wouldn't turn off without being unplugged, I had a bulb put above my sink, and my friends room had some water coming in from the ceiling corner. None of these made the stay less comfy, just something to know.

reviews.title: Lovely staff
reviews.text: The staff could not do enough for us.  They were great and very proud of their hotel.   My room and my sons rooms were not like the pictures they present.  The rooms are dirty.  Its about a 10-15 minute walk to the night markets depending on your age.  Theres no lift so if your older ask for a lower floor.   The hotel needs work on it.  But the staff are lovely and they are the best thing going for this hotel.  The breakfast is good.

reviews.title: A comfortable hotel with river views and helpful staff and we were able to overcome some little annoyance’s especially a
reviews.positives:
The property overlooked the river and we had a river view from our balcony.
A  flat 10 minute walk along the river to the old town.
We had a large room with plenty of storage and the bathroom had a separate rain shower and  bath in room 103 which is in separate wing of the hotel up a short flight of stairs.
TV had 200 channels with 22 English speaking ones also with subtitles.
YouTube was also available 
Breakfast included was served individually every day
The staff were all very pleasant.
A large pool on ground level with plenty of seating to relax
reviews.negatives:
On an extended stay the walk to downtown was too much but the hotel does provide free bicycles.
If you cannot manage stairs I assume there is an elevator in the new wing
The TV was a little small and even though over 200 channels were available, mainly Asian a little confusing to navigate as no instructions so I wrote some instructions in English which the hotel said they would leave in all the rooms.
Maybe because it was low season breakfast buffet not available and had to complete a form every night detailing breakfast  preferences which was quite extensive.Again probably because it was low season remedial construction above us started as early as 7 am with drilling noises. Not constant at all but a little annoying

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Staff wonderful.
Hotel not as described at Agoda...no shuttle to town, no restaurant, only breakfast.
Long way to town on unlit street.
Swimming pool area needs renovating, floor and chairs broken.

reviews.title: Comfortable , lovely and quiet hotel in a great quiet location easy
reviews.positives:
Great location just outside Old Quarter so it was quiet with easy walking distance to action.
Friendly, helpful staff. Breakfast was very good and made to order via menu choices the day before. Room was clean, comfortable , nice balcony . Right along river which was nice .
reviews.negatives: Bathroom was a bit dirty along wall edges but not bad and not a problem.

reviews.title: Not  value  for money
reviews.text: Our room was not very clean  the breakfast   was good  i would not stay  again

reviews.title: Great stay in beautiful Hoi An
reviews.positives:
The staff was amazing and very accommodating, helpful and friendly. Coordinated scooter rental, tours and directions where to find the best tailor in Hoi An. The tea ceremony was excellent with so much history on the regional tea cultures. 
Loved the city, beautiful at night, the markets were not overwhelming. Renting a scooter to drive to the beaches and the countryside is key, and traffic was manageable vs bigger cities! 
Again, the staff was amazing, loved Khuu!!
reviews.negatives: Plumbing! But the same everywhere!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Cũ và dơ
reviews.response:
Kính chào anh/chị,

Trước hết, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn anh/chị đã chọn lưu trú tại Serene Hoi An. Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng trải nghiệm của anh/chị chưa được như mong đợi, đặc biệt là về tình trạng phòng ốc.

Chúng tôi xin ghi nhận phản hồi của anh/chị và thành thật xin lỗi vì những bất tiện đã xảy ra. Hiện tại, khách sạn đang trong quá trình nâng cấp, cải tạo cơ sở vật chất, nhằm mang đến không gian  thoải mái hơn cho khách trong thời gian tới.

Chúng tôi rất trân trọng ý kiến đóng góp từ anh/chị và cam kết sẽ cải thiện để phục vụ tốt hơn. Rất mong có cơ hội được chào đón anh/chị trở lại để cảm nhận rõ sự thay đổi.

Trân trọng,
[Serene Hoi An]

reviews.title: Wonderful stay
reviews.positives: I had a fantastic stay at this hotel! The staff were exceptionally helpful and friendly, always ready to assist with anything I needed. The facilities were excellent, and everything was well-maintained. The location couldn't have been better, making it easy to explore the area. I also loved the bike rental service such a great way to get around and enjoy the surroundings. I highly recommend this hotel for anyone visiting the area! Breakfast was also lovely
reviews.negatives: All good

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The staff was wonderful, made me feel really welcome especially the lady at reception and all the ladies at the restaurant. The room was a bit of a let down, it felt old and musty. Location wasn't too bad, could easily walk to the old town.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.positives: The helpful staff with recommendations of the area, the location, breakfast and the view from our room.
reviews.negatives: Our balcony only had room for one.

reviews.title: Lovely staff, wrong location
reviews.text:
I stayed at this property for 3 nights. While the staff were genuinely lovely and accommodating, I would not choose to return, mainly due to the significant noise issues.

All rooms face the road, resulting in constant traffic noise including cars, motorbikes, honking, and passing boats. It was slightly quieter overnight, but the noise resumed from around 6am each morning. I was originally placed on the first floor for the first two nights and struggled to sleep due to the noise. Fortunately, the staff were kind enough to move me to a higher floor, which helped somewhat.

Additionally, the walls are quite thin, and noise from neighbouring rooms carries easily. During my stay, there were several large groups and families who were loud, inconsiderate, and disruptive, which further impacted the experience.

The location is also a bit removed from Hoi An Old Town. While the hotel provides complimentary old bicycles, which were appreciated, the distance made it impractical to walk, particularly in the heat.

Overall, despite the warm hospitality, the combination of noise, inconsiderate guests, and the less convenient location made for a disappointing stay.
reviews.response:

We are truly pleased to hear that you appreciated the friendliness and attentiveness of our staff. However, we’re also very sorry that your overall experience did not meet your expectations, particularly due to the noise and location.

We acknowledge your concerns regarding traffic noise and sounds from neighboring rooms. This is something we deeply regret, and we are actively reviewing ways to improve soundproofing in our rooms. In addition, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by noise from other guests during your stay. We will place greater emphasis on managing shared spaces to ensure a peaceful and comfortable environment for all visitors.

Regarding our location, the hotel is situated about 2km from the Ancient Town. While this is not far, we understand that the heat can make walking uncomfortable. We will cont

reviews.title: I highly recommend this location. Phuong and her colleagues were gracious and helpful, and made me feel at home. The loc
reviews.positives: Perfect location—walking distance to the center, but nice and peaceful for relaxing away from the commotion
reviews.negatives: Elegant, clean, fantastic staff

reviews.title: Good location but need updated
reviews.text: The room is very out dated. The bathtub seems to be unkept. I only stayed one night but that was adequate for me. The best thing about the hotel is its location. It js far enough to keep the noise from old town and give you a true feeling of Hoi An. Breakfast was below average. Staffs were helpful in some way but were not friendly. Front desk staffs were okay. Breakfast staffs need more training. They didn’t tell me that noodle was on the menu and only offered to their staffs. It was weird to see another table eating pho but none was offered to everyone else. I don’t think anyone knew that. Security staffs were nice. They seemed to be the one who acknowledged you.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
First of all, thank you for choosing our hotel and for taking the time to share your feedback. We are truly sorry to hear that your recent stay did not fully meet your expectations. Your comments regarding the room condition, breakfast quality, and the level of service from certain staff members have been taken very seriously.

We would also like to clarify that our breakfast is served in buffet style, and in addition, hot dishes such as noodles or pho are available upon request. Guests may simply inform our kitchen staff, and we will be happy to prepare and serve these dishes fresh.

We sincerely apologize if this information was not clearly communicated during your stay. We will work closely with our team to ensure such details are better conveyed to our guests in the future.

Once again, thank you for your feedback — it is extremely valuable in helping us improve.
We sincerely apologize for the lack of communication about the breakfast menu, especially regarding i

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: What a nice stay we had!  Great staff who are quick to smile and all speak some English and Phuong's was excellent as was all her help.  Great breakfast, nice pool, fast Wifi, 1 day laundry service,   Away from the hustle and bustle but close enough to walk.  Renovations are under way to make it even better!  Tours and transportation can be arranged.  Highly recommend!
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: POOR BREAKFAST

reviews.title: Great stay, a stonesthrow away from Hoi An center
reviews.positives: Though not as peaceful as I hoped it would be, the location is great if you want to be away from the hustle and bustle of central historic Hoi An, but still in walking distance. The location is lovely and the garden offers nice and breezy river views. The hosts gives good information on do's and dont's in Hoi An and has recommendations for food, shops and tours. We especially like her recommendation for Chicken Rice ;) . There are some nice restaurants very close to the hotel, so it's no problem if you don't want to venture into the circus of Hoi An in the evening. The bicycles of the hotel are good for short distances into the city. The pool is sufficient for kids to play a bit and cool off.
reviews.negatives: The wifi was not always working properly.

reviews.title: Good location and pool. It could be cleaner.
reviews.text:
The pool and the location are fine. But for the price we paid they sould finish the electric installation and clean the hotel a bit better.

I felt like there was a lack of maintenance.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
I liked our room B1 overlooking the pool and river..bright and airy and a lovely view 
The staff were all very kind and friendly. Phuong at the front desk was so helpful with whatever we needed, a very sweet lady. The breakfast was great. You choose the night before what you want… lots of choice.
The walk to the old town was about 10 min. It’s so pretty but the crowds are madness. Go for an early morning bike ride if you can
reviews.negatives: My only complaint was the wifi could have been a bit better. It was slow sending and connecting sometimes. And the road and river out front were a bit noisy at times. But this wouldn’t stop me from staying here again. Everything else was great. (The countryside pics are Cam Ha …added by mistake)

reviews.title: The Name Says It All
reviews.text:
I'm actually considering extending my stay. 

The location is phenomenal for Hoi An. When the crowds start to get intense in the evening, I can quickly shuffle my way back and enjoy some peace & serenity from the madness. The hotel is a short walk to the main strip and located just around a bend in the road near the river.

The staff are friendly and very helpful, especially the hotelier who provided me with lots of useful information about the area.

The downside for me was the cleanliness and overall state of the room when I arrived. The curtain was broken. The bathtub was dirty and I had to rinse down someone else's hair. The toilet seat was broken and dirty with a wild swivel to it when you sit down. 

The most important part of the room, the bed, was emaculate and comfortable.

Despite some minor flaws, I really like this place and would totally recommend this hotel to someone who wants to keep one foot in and one foot out of the flood of tourists visiting Hoi An.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

We are truly delighted to hear that you enjoyed our peaceful riverside location and that our proximity to the Old Town offered you the perfect balance between vibrant experiences and relaxing moments. At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the cleanliness and maintenance issues you encountered upon arrival. What you described falls below our usual standards, and we have immediately addressed these matters with our housekeeping and maintenance teams. Thank you for pointing them out in such a constructive way — it gives us the opportunity to improve.

We’re glad to know that the comfort of your bed made your stay more enjoyable, and we truly appreciate your recommendation despite the inconveniences. Your feedback me

reviews.title: Comfortable Stay Near the Riverside
reviews.positives: The location is great with a good view of the riverside! The staff is very friendly and supportive if you have any questions they will be happy to answer them. It's also easy to walk to the Old Town from there or just get a Grab if it's too hot. The breakfast was also a plus and the coffee.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast ordering is a bit slow. Try to focus more on the guests' order and have that communicated so that the food can come out in a sufficient time.

reviews.title: Overnight stay
reviews.text: I booked this hotel just for one night because the hotel I want to stay was full for that night.  The hotel is old and not well kept even though it has a nice view of Thu Bong river across from my balcony.  Breakfast is not bad!

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.positives: Great location close walking distance to the old town and plenty of restaurants near by. The hotel itself is very cute and offers an amazing free breakfast. The pool is also heated which is a plus! The staff are amazing especially Eric who helped me book multiple tours that i really enjoyed - the hoi a memories show and the cooking class were highlights but my son was also a great experience for history. I would stay here again when in hoi an.
reviews.negatives: Everything was great

reviews.title: Prevalent Water Leakage Issue
reviews.text:
1) Water leakage from Ceiling into  Room C5 near bed & C6 (which was offered when C5 Leakage found).  Ceiling leakage also found at dining area.  Property owner should redo the water proofing.
2) Staff handover and/or need to improve as we already indicated our breakfast choices the night before on paper and yet need to redo it in the morning.

reviews.title: Highly recommend
reviews.positives:
Good location and very friendly and helpful staff 
Highly recommend

reviews.title: It was okay.
reviews.text: The location is okay if you willing to walk about 10-15mins to the oldtown as it's quite deep inside.  I walk during night time so it was ok but day time for this distance I rather took a grab. However, the hotel need to be maintance as I book a king deluxe room but the bed is quite smelly like some old bed. The furniture is somehow looks old and hopefully can do a renovation or some cleaning on it.  staff is friendly,, breakfast choice was okay like you can choose 1 main and 1 drink. Overall i think is fine but I feel the hotel can do so much better in term of the maintanances.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The hotel is excellent. Beautiful room with great view, the pool is great, the breakfast was also good. They offer bikes to go around.
reviews.negatives: The location was a little far away from everything. Its a ten minute walk, but its tough in the Vietnam humidity.

reviews.title: Old property with lots of ants/insect problems!
reviews.text:
Well the room was ok, but old and worst had lots of ants! I literally slept with 2-3 ants in bed and got bitten at multiple places.
I must mention though that the staff is very good, helpful and responsive! The lady who checked us in made our full 2 day itinerary for us. From where to visit, where to buy tickets (by not getting fooled by locals), where to eat with great recommendations, where to see sunset and covered everything!! Also they got our breakfast packed for us as we had to leave early and must say it was very good.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
The location was great, just a few minutes walk to the old town but far enough to be quiet.
The team was helpful and friendly.
reviews.negatives: The shower was a little on the weak pressure side of things.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Lovely stay at this hotel. If you don’t like bugs, then this isn’t for you. Lots of bugs in our room for our 3 night stay. However, is expected since it is close to the river/trees. The standing shower was not clean at all + blinds area. So we showered in the bathtub.  Spacious room. Great customer service from all staff and great breakfast. Good scenery of the river and loved having breakfast with a lovely view.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Perfect location right outside the hustle and/or bustle of old town.  Beautiful garden. Refreshing pool. Helpful and attentive staff. Comfortable bed and cool air conditioned room. I would def stay here again.

reviews.title: Boutique hotel stay at prime location
reviews.text:
The only pro was the location is great cause it’s near the ancient town and night market. It’s easy to get around with bicycles and motorbikes. 

However, the room we got was on the lower ground so the river view was blocked by plants the hotel grew for privacy. The door in our room was faulty and the toiletries are not refilled unless we leave the empty toiletries out on purpose for housekeeping to notice. 

There was lots of lizards, spiders and other small insects along the corridors to the room if that isn’t your thing. 

Hotel breakfast was almost the same food everyday with some fruit flies hanging around the fruit platter.
reviews.response:

The room you stayed in is located on a lower floor with river views partially screened by greenery. This is part of our design to ensure privacy and tranquility. However, when you raised the issue, we offered to move you to a different room, and we appreciate your kind response that a room change wasn’t necessary.

For bathroom amenities, our housekeeping team refills them daily as per our standard protocol. Should guests require additional items, we are always happy to provide them upon request.

As for the presence of a small spider, we do understand your concern. Given the hotel’s riverside location surrounded by lush greenery, occas

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Location, intimacy, staff
reviews.negatives: It’s not that was bad but not the best to have toilet in the shower

reviews.title: 3day stay
reviews.text: The staff are very friendly and helpful,free pushbikes and swimming pool we’re good ,we had a few minor issues and is a little walk from town but overall a nice place

reviews.title: Fantastic stay
reviews.positives: The property was clean and had everything we needed. The room was big and clean. The bikes were very comfortable and we were always able to reserve one. The pool was clean and refreshing. We liked that the property was near town but not in the hustle and bustle—just a short 5-10 min walk from the center. The hotel provided robes and sandals. They also had plenty of umbrellas for the rain. Breakfast was a great value! The staff, Tina and the gentlemen that help with the bags, were delightful. We would recommend this hotel to friends and would book again.

reviews.title: Location was awesome
reviews.text:
This hotel is situated at the river front abd the view was awesome. Breakfast menu is very limited but good quality.

I didn’t like behaviour of the receptionist.. I was there for 2 days and when I was checking out my throat was completely swollen so I went to a medical store to buy medicine so we were late about an hour for check out so they charged me 200000 VND extra for that. 
I requested her and told her that was medical emergency but she refused and took 200000 VND.

The property is very good but the staff don’t know what the hospitality is, and how to treat the guests.
reviews.response: Hi Akshay, The hotel has received your review. The hotel check-out time is 12:00 noon, we have informed you to check out on time because we are fully booked that day. You are free to leave your luggage at the front desk when checking out. But you checked out 2 hours late. We have tried to charge you the lowest surcharge of 200,000 VND. The hotel has the receipt and camera to prove that you checked out late at 14:00, although the front desk tried to tell you that we are fully booked and cannot check out late. The hotel is very happy with your positive review of the hotel in general.

reviews.title: This was the best accommodation we have experienced so far on our long trip through Asia.
reviews.positives: We loved it all, from the extremely attentive, chatty and smiley Eric (Din) in reception - he was the best - the wonderful attendant in the red jacket, to the pool, to the room, the amazingly comfortable bed, the view, the endless supply of filtered or bottled water, the delicious breakfast and the proximity to town - easy walking distance - without all the craziness and noise that is a lot of fun when there. They have bicycles you can borrow too!
reviews.negatives: There was nothing we didn't like.

reviews.title: Good hotel but services need improvement
reviews.text:
Pros- Location, rooms
Cons - No lift, No telephone in room, 1 English speaking staff, Breakfast menu template.

reviews.title: Thank you for having us!
reviews.positives: Great property and location. Super friendly staff and great pool area.

reviews.title: Decent stay at Corner riverside hotel

The hotel garden is very beautiful, lush vegetation, but the hotel itself is tired and not the cleanest. The owner should do a big cleaning and show some paint on the walls and get a pretty good result :)
In the information, a nice woman who told where to go, what to do and where to eat, etc. He was very nice, feel free to ask him for information ;)
Breakfast was very good and coffee like in Europe :D

reviews.title: River front hotel

The staff there was their best, super informative and friendly. We got room with  beautiful balcony towards the river.

reviews.title: Home away from home!
reviews.positives:
Our stay at Gia Riverside Hotel during Tet week was absolutely unforgettable. From the moment we arrived, we felt genuinely welcomed — not just checked in. Someone personally greeted us, sat down with us, explained how everything worked (including their incredible breakfast system), showed us where everything was on a map, and even asked about our plans so they could help us figure out the best way to organize our time in town. That level of care made us feel less like guests and more like friends arriving home.

The atmosphere is special — warm, peaceful, and personal. The rooms are spotless and comfortable, the pool area is lovely and relaxing, and there’s a great little café/bar with a pool table that gives the place a social but cozy vibe. They even have a small outdoor gym near the pool, which was such a nice surprise.

The breakfast deserves its own paragraph — the best we’ve had anywhere. Each evening you choose exactly what you’d like for the next morning, and it’s freshly prepared at the time that suits you. It feels thoughtful, unrushed, and completely personalized.

The hotel overlooks the river and is only about 500 meters from Ancient Town, so it’s perfectly located — close enough to walk everywhere, but just far enough to enjoy quiet mornings and evenings.

They also had brand new bicycles available for guests, which made exploring Hoi An even more enjoyable and easy.

Staying here during Tet made it even more special, but what truly stands out is the people. If you’re looking for somewhere that feels welcoming, attentive, and genuinely caring — this is it. We would return in a heartbeat.
reviews.negatives: Nothing. It was perfect.

reviews.title: Great place to stay to see Hoi A without being right in the middle of the crowds. Recommended!
reviews.positives: Tini at the front desk was great! Very friendly and helpful. The rest of the staff were also very nice.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: It is a nice, beautiful, modern, cozy villa with good view of the river. There is no elevator so guests should be prepared to climb stairs.  The distance to the old town is slightly far so some walking is expected. The breakfast is plentiful and nice, while wifi signal is strong. The room is comfortable and cozy, though the cleanliness can be further improved. The staff are extremely friendly, cheerful and helpful, especially Ms Thuy who greets everyone with a big smile. There are also free bicycles to hop on to explore, so overall it is a nice place to stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Beautiful hotel, excellent service, the staff here amazing, especially Greenie- Hotel manager, she always welcomed me with the beautiful smile, given me a lot of suggestions and make my stay more enjoyable, Tina and Eric also friendly and helpful

reviews.title: The location is good.
reviews.text: A cost-effective accommodation where I stayed for 3 nights. I decided based on the location. It takes about 15 minutes to walk to the Old Town’s Nayeon Bridge. As a budget stay, it was just passable. I was uneasy because small ants were crawling around in the room, but fortunately, they didn’t get on the bed. I had to keep all my bags closed when going out. There was also a bit of a musty smell in the room. The advantages are that the hot water runs well and the air conditioning is strong. The breakfast is also reasonable for the price. The staff are relatively friendly. There's a river in front of the accommodation, so it's a nice view to sit in the shade of the trees and have tea.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Incredible views, amazing rooms very clean. Bathrooms were great, shower was always hot. Great location away from crowds but close enough to walk.

Eric at the front desk was the most helpful of our entire trip. He knows the city so well and gave us many helpful tips. So friendly, we will always remember how special Eric made our stay in hoi an.

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text:
Small but enough. They have swimming pool, gym, tearoom, restaurant, riverside coffee  shuttle bus. Nice staff.
Not a well sleep because the rooster crows at 5:00am not easy for me
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us at Serene Riverside Hotel Hoi An.

We’re glad to hear that you found good value in your stay and enjoyed our facilities such as the swimming pool, gym, tearoom, riverside café, and shuttle service. Your kind words about our staff are also greatly appreciated.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the early morning rooster noise. While we are located in a more local, riverside area which can bring a unique cultural experience, we understand how this may have affected your sleep. We will look into possible ways to minimize such disturbances for light sleepers.

Thank you again for your feedback. We hope to welcome you back for a more restful stay next time.

Warm regards,
Serene Riverside Hotel Hoi An

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
I had the pleasure of staying at Serene Riverside Hotel, and it truly lives up to its name. Nestled by the river, this place is a peaceful haven that offers the perfect balance of tranquility and convenience. From the moment I arrived, I knew I had found somewhere special. The hotel is an idyllic escape, with stunning river views that create an atmosphere of calm and relaxation.

The staff were absolutely amazing. They made me feel right at home from the start, always ready to assist with anything I needed, and their genuine warmth made my stay even more memorable. Every interaction felt personal, and it was clear they truly cared about making guests feel comfortable.
The breakfasts here are worth mentioning—they were always fresh, delicious, and well-prepared.

I originally planned to stay for a week but ended up staying for almost a month because the experience was just that good. It’s the perfect place for digital nomads, offering the quiet atmosphere needed for focus and productivity, while also providing plenty of space to unwind and recharge when needed.

reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you very much for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to share your honest and thoughtful feedback.
We’re delighted to know you appreciated the enthusiasm of our staff, especially our lovely and cheerful security guard — a favorite among many guests. We also appreciate your kind words about the hotel’s convenient location, well-equipped facilities, and airy balcony rooms.

We do acknowledge your comments regarding the hotel being a bit dated and the temporary noise from ongoing maintenance work. These renovations are part of our efforts to enhance guest experience, and we thank you for your understanding.

Once again, thank you for your stay, and we look forward to welcoming you back with improved facilities in the near future.

reviews.title: A great place to stay in Hoi An
reviews.text: The hotel is across from the river and just a short bike ride or walk from Old Town. The small distance separating it from the hustle and bustle means that it is in a more relaxing, tranquil area and it has a lovely seating area right beside the river. Phuong the front desk manager was really helpful with the advice and information she provided. I was thrilled that she booked a very early morning tour of My Son (departed at 5:15am) for us as I had wanted to go but the heat during our stay was so oppressive I didn't think I could manage during the day. Her tailor recommendation was sound too. The breakfasts were delicious. I highly recommend a stay here. If you struggle with stairs, make sure you inform them during booking as our room was up three flights of stairs which was not an issue for me (and they graciously carried our heavy suitcases both up and down the stairs for us) but might be for some guests.

reviews.title: A distance from the busy Hoi An
reviews.text: This hotel is a 15 minute walk from Hoi An old town's ticket office.  Walking to and fro will make you appreciate the old town more, as it shows you the transition from tourist hotels, to street side dining, to crossing the bridge to the town proper.  We visited last August 2025, it is summer in Vietnam. To cool off in between tours we dipped in the hotel's pool.  The only comment is that there is no elevator.  this is important if your have a lot of luggage, and are already tired from walking around town.  The staff are accommodating and will give you a guide where to eat authentic food, and will suggest interesting sights as well.  Breakfast was lovely, dining beside the koi pond, the food is generous yum.  I miss Vietnam already.  Thank you Serene Riverside Hotel Hoi An.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

On behalf of the entire team at Serene Riverside Hotel Hoi An, we sincerely thank you for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to share such a thoughtful and detailed review.

We are truly delighted to hear that your experience—from the walk to the Ancient Town, cooling off in the pool during the summer heat, to enjoying a hearty breakfast by the koi pond—was both memorable and enjoyable. Your kind words about our staff and their local recommendations mean a lot to us.

We also appreciate your feedback regarding the lack of an elevator. While we currently do not have one, our team is always happy to assist with luggage to ensure your stay is as comfortable as possible.

We already look forward to the opportunity of welcoming you back to Hoi An in the near future.

Warmest wishes,
Serene Riverside Hotel Hoi An

We’re absolutely delighted to hear that you had such a pleasant and relaxing stay with us. It’s great to know that our peaceful location, spacious rooms, and overall atmosphere suited your needs—especially when traveling with seniors.

Warm regards,
Serene Riverside Hotel Hoi An

Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn lưu trú tại khách sạn và dành thời gian chia sẻ những cảm nhận rất chi tiết.

Khách sạn cũng xin ghi nhận góp ý của Quý khách về diện tích phòng và nhu cầu sử dụng giường phụ. Chúng tôi sẽ xem xét bổ sung và cải thiện dịch vụ để đáp ứng linh hoạt hơn theo nhu cầu của khách hàng trong tương lai.

reviews.title: Hôtel agréable et paisible à proximité du centre-ville
reviews.positives:
L’accueil chaleureux de Tina dés notre arrivée.
L’emplacement très au calme à 15min à pieds du centre de la vieille ville.
Le petit déjeuner était très chouette, c’est agréable de décider la veille ce qu’on souhaite manger pour le lendemain, on est servis directement, c’est copieux et très bon (le meilleur qu’on ait eu en Asie du Sud-Est pour le moment) !
Le mega + : location de vélos gratuites qui vous permet de vous balader à l’extérieur de la ville dans les rizières et villages alentours ! 
Le tout avec une jolie piscine et vue sur la rivière.
Nous recommandons cet hôtel ! ⭐️
reviews.negatives:
Malheureusement, notre chambre sentait l’humidité ce qui peut être incommodant pour les nez sensibles.

Si nous devions recommander quelque chose aux hôtes ce serait davantage d’aérer les chambres au risque que celles-ci soit un peu plus chaudes à notre arrivée.

Tout petit bémol: la chambre n’a pas été nettoyée durant notre séjour alors que nous avions mis l’insigne sur notre porte pour demander son nettoyage. Ce n’est vraiment pas grave puisqu’on ne restait que deux nuits, peut être est-ce un oubli ou peut être les chambres ne sont faites qu’un jour sur deux. Comme mentionné plus haut, les draps de lits sentent vite l’humidité de la chambre donc il aurait été plaisant de les changer mais rien de très grave c’est quand même un bel établissement qui vaut le détour! ☺️

Everyone was great, from housekeeping to security. Plus, the riverside location is amazing.

reviews.title: Great value, but needs renovation
reviews.text:
Beautiful hotel a little outside of old town. For the money, I'd say it's definitely worth the stay. The view is absolutely incredible.

Pros:
1. Made-to-order breakfast is delicious
2. Location is amazing. Pretty quiet as it's outside of the chaotic old town, but still along the river.
3. Free bike rentals. My favorite activity is taking the bike out to the beach side
4. Staff is super friendly and accommodating

Cons:
1. Rooms need a bit more cleaning and maintenance. Our AC was leaking and had rust running down the walls. It's quite unsightly and not something I want in my hotel room

Overall, would stay again.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách đã có những ngày nghỉ dễ chịu, đặc biệt là tại phòng gác mái với tầm nhìn đẹp – đây cũng là loại phòng được rất nhiều khách yêu thích nhờ không gian thoáng đãng và riêng tư.

Chúng tôi cũng ghi nhận góp ý về việc khách sạn không có thang máy, điều này có thể gây bất tiện khi đi cùng em bé hoặc mang nhiều hành lý. Đội ngũ lễ tân và nhân viên hỗ trợ luôn sẵn sàng giúp đỡ mang hành lý, nhưng chúng tôi hiểu rằng trải nghiệm cá nhân vẫn có thể bị ảnh hưởng, và rất cảm ơn Quý khách đã chia sẻ một cách thiện chí.

Về phòng tầng trệt, do gần lối đi nên đôi khi có thể nghe tiếng bước chân – chúng tôi xin ghi nhận để cải thiện cách bố trí phòng và cách âm trong thời gian tới.

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã đưa ra lời khuyên rất hữu ích cho các du khách khác: “nên đặt phòng view đẹp” – và hy v

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Greenie a été très gentille et nous a bien aidés
reviews.negatives: Emplacement et piscine

reviews.title: Amazing Stay
reviews.text: I booked for three nights with a view of the river and balcony.   Waking up each morning with the view is amazing.  Great staff in the front desk.   The only downside is that it’s a 8 minute walk to the old town.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience at Serene Riverside Hotel Hoi An.

We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay with us, especially the beautiful river view from your balcony and the warm service from our front desk team. Your kind words truly mean a lot to us.

We appreciate your feedback about the 8-minute walk to the Old Town. While we are slightly set back from the center, many guests find the peaceful riverside location to be a perfect balance between tranquility and accessibility. That said, we will continue working to improve our guest experience in every way possible.

We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the near future!

Warm regards,
Serene Riverside Hotel Hoi An.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La dame de l'accueil était merveilleuse, elle nous a expliqué comment nous rendre en ville et profiter au maximum de Hoi an, la chambre était incroyable avec une vue magnifique sur la rivière. Les vélos sont en libre service et nous les avons utilisés pour nous rendre partout.

reviews.title: The hotel is very nice.
reviews.text:
The door is a bit old - no lock :D and if you shower, the wind blows in a little due to the wide gap.

The swimming pool is very clean, small, cute, and has a perfect depth. 
The river view is beautiful and refreshingly cool, with a rare and refreshing breeze blowing.

The staff is lovely. The room rate is very nice for a wonderful place to stay. I rarely recommend places, but I’m actually considering staying a few more days because I really like it here.
It's about 1.5 km from the hotel to the old town, making it suitable for those who enjoy walking. If I won the lottery, I would buy land next to the hotel to live there for fun because I love it so much.
reviews.response: Thank you so much for your incredibly lovely and heartfelt review of Serene Riverside Hội An! We’re thrilled to know that you enjoyed the refreshing riverside view, the clean and charming pool, as well as the friendliness of our staff. Your suggestion regarding the door and bathroom ventilation is much appreciated — we’ll definitely look into it to enhance our guests’ comfort. Knowing that you’re considering extending your stay truly means the world to us! We hope to welcome you back again soon — or maybe even as a future neighbor, as you so playfully mentioned!"

reviews.title: Merci à toute l’équipe
reviews.positives:
Greenie et l’équipe de réception étaient vraiment sympathiques et disponibles pour nous tout au long de notre séjour.
Les vélos disponibles gratuitement, la piscine agréable.
La salle de sport extérieur.
L’hôtel est proche du vieux quartier d’Hoi An à pied en 5/10 min.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Love the location. Quiet, calm and relaxing. Friendly staff too

reviews.title: Petit hôtel ravissant en bord de rivière.
reviews.positives:
Ravis de notre séjour dans cet hôtel.
Il est rare que je mette 10/10 mais c est mérité.
Ambiance familiale. Très bon rapport qualité prix.
Très bien situé un peu à l écart de la ville au bord de la rivière mais en même temps près de tout (restaurant, boutiques à 5 mn à pied).
Prêt de vélos. Nombreux conseils pour organiser excursion et chauffeur. Propreté. Confort, piscine…tout était parfait
Merci à Tina et toute l équipe 🥰

reviews.title: Very nice hotel
reviews.text:
Very welcoming. Clean room, spacious with a balcony overlooking river.
Staff very helpful. Nice choices for breakfast
May be a little out the way for some but I personally appreciated the quieter setting along the river

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Personnel dévoué et très attentifs aux besoins exprimés.
Vélos mis à disposition gracieusement.
Transports organisés.
Location de vélo électrique organisée

reviews.title: All staff are exceptionally nice and willing to help
reviews.text: Most relaxing stay. We love it here. It’s like home away from home. Of course it is not 100% perfect (no place is) but if you need something you ask and they gladly provide this will do us

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tout était parfait, l’accueil chaleureux du personnel, le confort, les services accessoires, l’emplacement. Merci Tina, Eric et Greenie

reviews.title: Lovely stay with friendly staff
reviews.text: We had a fantastic stay at the hotel. The room was comfortable and well-equipped. The hotel is a short walk from the Old-Town - close enough, but also away from the hustle and bustle. The staff were fantastic and quick to help with anything we needed, including booking lovely activities.

reviews.title: Un très bon séjour hôtel bien placé et personnel très accueillant
reviews.positives: Le personnel très gentil, très bon emplacement à 10min à bien du Old Town

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I had stayed at thod hotel for one night. It had a very nice view of Bon River. But, little bit expensive, compared to other properties. Anyway I didn't have anything to complain about. It's in walkable distance to Old town. You can just sit in the balcony and relax by watching the river whole day.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Superbe hôtel très bien placé, rapport qualité prix au top et surtout Henry a été de super bon conseils et nous a bien aidé dans la préparation de la suite de notre voyage ! Un grand merci à lui !

reviews.title: Oasis on the River
reviews.text: We had a lovely stay. Staff were all super helpful, friendly and polite. Lovely pool to cool off on a hot day. Relaxing views of the river and garden seating. After the kind of crazy crowds around the old town, it was great to come back to the peaceful environment of this hotel.  Thank you to all the staff.

reviews.title: Super séjour avec un super accueil dans un très bel hôtel simple et de qualité.
reviews.positives: Très bel hôtel au calme à la sortie de ville avec vue magnifique sur la rivière, très beau jardin terrasse. Très bon petit déjeuner avec des prêt de vélos c'est génial pour visiter la très belle ville d'Hoi An. Greenie et Eric nous accueillent très bien. Toute l'équipe est aux petits soins, le garçon au petit déjeuner les personnes de l'entretien sont adorables.
reviews.negatives: Certaines chambres sont assez humides et certains lits sont un peu trop fermes, durs mais pas dans toutes les chambres. Et dans la suite ou d'autres chambres il serait super d'installer des éclairages plus doux près du lit.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Villa nằm view ra bờ sông, rất mát mẻ và thanh bình. Villa có thêm phần đối diện ngồi bên bờ sông buổi tối rất êm đềm.
Sáng có thể mượn xe đạp (miễn phí) thong dong vào phố cổ chơi rồi về

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tina & Eric ont su nous orienter vers des supers activités ( lanterne, coconut boat, memorial show, etc .. ) leur gentillesse est incroyable. Merci pour tout si on doit revenir a Hoi An ce sera a cet hôtel qui a un rapport qualité prix imbattable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Very cute boutique hotel overlooking the river. Close to the market on bike, but equally far from the hustle bustle. Loved how cozy the place is. The only issue we had was that there is no elevator! But the staff carried our bags up and down the stairs!
Phuong, the receptionist at the hotel,  also provided us with excellent recommendations for local attractions and locations to buy the lantern boat ride ( so that we don't get cheated on). She also helped us find the right bike rental shop.
Additionally, the housekeeping staff was prompt and efficient in attending to any requests, ensuring that all my requirements were met.

reviews.title: Merveilleux
reviews.positives: Tout !!! c'etait parfait

reviews.title: Amazing staffs
reviews.text: This hotel is located in a quiet place from the hustle and bustle of the old town, which we really like, but not too far within walking distance, the staff are very friendly and always help with what you want, the breakfast is delicious, and the green hotel atmosphere is very calming with views river in front, book this hotel and you will not be disappointed at that price, with clean rooms, green and calm atmosphere, super friendly staff and a very delicious breakfast what else can you expect

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Très bel hôtel situé non loin de la vielle ville, au calme, avec vue sur la rivière.
Khuu Phuong à l'accueil et toute l'équipe ont été super avec nous.
Merci encore ❤️

reviews.title: Satisfactory accommodation
reviews.text: The location is very good, about a 10-minute walk from Hoi An Old Town. The area is quiet, and you can see the riverside from the room's terrace. Breakfast is not a buffet but ordered à la carte, so there aren't many options, but the food is delicious and feels thoughtful. The fruits and drinks after the meal are just as tasty as those in a café. There is a river right in front of the hotel, and there are tables and chairs provided by the accommodation, making it a nice place to relax with a charming atmosphere. Although it feels a bit dated, the rooms are of adequate size and facilities, offering very good value for money. I would be willing to visit again.

reviews.title: Parfait, merci pour la qualité du service qui a rendu notre séjour plus que parfait
reviews.positives: La localisation, la chambre, la piscine, la vue, les employées et leurs gentillesses

reviews.title: A lovely hotel surrounded by greenery.
reviews.text: I stayed at the Riverview King Suite for two nights. The balcony, although small, offered a lovely river view, and the cute room decor was very nice. However, it was disappointing that the hot water quickly turned to cold, and the bathtub's plug was loose, making it impossible to fill the tub with water. It's understandable due to the lush environment, but there were quite a few bugs in the room. I found the small but charming pool and the garden along the river across the street to be very soothing. Breakfast was served in a style where you could choose your favorite from about ten set menu options, and it was filling and very delicious. The greatest charm of this hotel is the character of the staff. They were always cheerful, kind, charming, and lovely. Even a few minor complaints about the facilities could be forgiven because of the wonderful personality of the staff (laughs). I would highly recommend this hotel for enjoying Hoi An.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Schönes Hotel / Anlage. Leider auf Grund des Regens zur aktuellen Jahreszeit wenig besucht und nicht alles nutzbar.
Sehr freundliches und hilfsbereites Personal. 
Kostenloser Billardtisch verfügbar.
Lage ist etwas außerhalb, die Altstadt ist jedoch fussläufig zu erreichen. Auf Grund der Lage angenehm ruhig.
reviews.negatives:
Auf Grund des seit Wochen anhaltenden Regens extrem feuchtes Zimmer, welches auch durch die Klimaanlage nicht trocken geworden ist. All unsere Klamotten sind klamm, ein Magazin aus Zeitungspapier hat sich komplett zusammengerollt. 
Badeinrichtung etwas in die Jahre gekommen + Schimmel.

reviews.title: Hotel staff
reviews.text: We had the perfect stay at Corner Riverside.  We even stayed an extra 2 days. All the staff were excellent and so helpful and friendly, especially Phuong who was amazing. She really looked after us booking tours and even booked our sleeper bus to our next destination.  Highly recommended.  Thank you all 👏👏😁

reviews.title: Ruhig gelegenes Hotel am Flussufer nahe der Innenstadt
reviews.positives: Das Hotel hat uns sehr gut gefallen. Es liegt fußläufig nur 5-10 Minuten entfernt von der trubeligen Innenstadt am Fluss - ideal für eine Stadtbesichtigung. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Wir hatten ein schönes Zimmer mit Balkon und Ausblick über eine kleine Straße hinweg zum Ufer. Das gute Frühstück kann bei schönem Wetter auch draußen auf der angrenzenden Terrasse eingenommen werden. Auch im Garten direkt am Flussufer gibt es einige Tische und Sitzgelegenheiten, zu denen man zum Frühstück (und auch abends) Getränke und Essen vom Hotelrestaurant mitnehmen kann - allerdings trennt die mitunter hauptsächlich von Mopeds befahrene kleine Straße diesen schön gelegenen Garten vom eigentlichen Hotel. Ansonsten sitzt man dort wirklich angenehm - wird jedoch hier nicht bedient. Wir würden beim nächsten Mal wieder in diesem Hotel wohnen wollen.
reviews.negatives: Es war alles in Ordnung.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Staff are very welcoming and helpful and are the main reason I enjoyed my stay here. I liked their breakfasts too which were generous. The hotel is located close to old town, up to 15 min walk along the river.  The only thing to improve in my opinion is to invest in new towels - the ones I received were all old and worn-down.

reviews.title: Wer Komfort und Entspannung sucht, ist hier genau richtig.
reviews.positives: Sehr freundliches Personal (danke an Eric und alle anderen Mitarbeiterinnen), leckeres Frühstück, kostenlose Fahrräder zum Ausleihen & ein großer Pool zum Entspannen! Den Sonnenuntergang sieht man perfekt vom Balkon aus.
reviews.negatives: Man ist etwas außerhalb, ist mit den Rädern aber super schnell in der Old Town. Außerdem liegt das Hotel an einer Straße, man hört also vorbeifahrende Autos und Roller.

reviews.title: Wonderful host!
reviews.text:
Phoung, was a helpful and gracious host who helped us have a very enjoyable visit to Hoi An despite heavy rain during our visit.  Our room , their suite was spacious and had the largest bathtub  we had ever had the pleasure to soak in.  It was made of stone.  The  hotel is located  across the street from the water and had an inviting pool.  It was a ten minute walk from the center of town, close, but far enough away from the crowds.  

Phoung provided a list of restaurants, businesses and  activities that she recommended and sat down with us upon arrival to orient us and  annotate her list.  We patronized many of the restaurants,  coffee shops and both tailor’s on her list all were top notch and some clearly oriented to the local residents.

reviews.title: Tolles Hotel mit guter Lage
reviews.positives: Tolle Zimmer mit schönen Ausblick. Personal sehr  freundlich. Kostenlose Fahrräder zum ausleihen. Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt. In wenigen Minuten ist man im Zentrum von Hoi An und kann das bunte Treiben der Stadt mit all den Lampions genießen.

reviews.title: quiet place to stay
reviews.text: the room has a balcony and we had a fine time watching the boats go to and fro. the staff were wonderful especially Khuu who helped us out a lot!  (book a foot massage, transport to danang,   what route to take, where to go, cook  while we waited for the service car, etc) and Viet, who was the receptionist when we arrived and who offered to lend us his motorbike when we told him we would look for a place to eat. the layout of the hotel is beautiful and zen and was a little further than we thought it would be. but a little walking does no harm and grab was also cheap. bikes and umbrellas can be used for free. the breakfast is lovely and with a wider selection than most. they serve everything fresh and new as Khuu does the marketing early morning based on the order.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Gutes Preis Leistungsverhältnis.Sehr freundliches Personal.Sehr sauber!

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text:
Great room and pool, 10 minutes walk to the center.
The receptionist was very hulpfull.
Overal great hotel!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Ganz süßes Hotel in der Nähe der Altstadt. Personal auch tolle Gastgeber.

reviews.title: Great place to stay in a picturesque town
reviews.text: A very modern neat and tidy hotel where the staff all make one really welcome. I would highly recommend anyone to stay.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Sehr hilfreiches Personal,  schöne Lage. Sehr schönes Zimmer. Perfekt,  da nicht mitten in der Altstadt und doch dank der Fahrräder nah genug.

reviews.title: Nice from afar.
reviews.text:
👍 :Nice service, friendly staff, they can support for customers everyrthing they can do, clean, nice view with river side , nice breakfast
👎: have mosquito, far from center of Hội An old town

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Super nettes Personal. Sehr hilfsbereit.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Overall it is still satisfy. Although there is no lift/elevator, but the staff is kind to help to carry your luggage to the room or bring down to lobby when check-out. Slight drawback is the hot shower. During the peak hour (example night time), when many people is showering at the similar time (between 8.30pm-10pm), there will be no hot water. Maybe is the hotel is using solar water heater?

reviews.title: Perfekter Aufenthalt in Hoi An
reviews.positives: Sehr guter Service in allen Bereichen, leckeres Frühstück, Lage hervorragend, man ist mit dem Fahrrad innerhalb weniger Minuten im Zentrum. Pool sehr gepflegt, Zimmer sehr sauber. Wir würden immer wieder her kommen!

reviews.title: Best hotel in Hoi an
reviews.text: All staff are helpful. Cleanness,  Lakeview, staff everything is good for us . 10/10 rating from my side.

reviews.title: 3 Nächte in Hoi An
reviews.positives: Ich fände das Hotel sehr schön. Die Lage war super und es gab Fahrräder zum ausleihen mit denen man super schnell in der Innenstadt ist. Vor allem Tina, Eric und Truong haben sich immer super um alles gekümmert. Ich habe mich total wohl gefühlt und würde immer wieder kommen. Dankeschön!!!
reviews.negatives: Nichts

reviews.title: Great hotel with lovely staff
reviews.text: Good location, but just a bit far if you are going to the Old Quarter multiple times a day. Easy solution though - use their free bicycles!

reviews.title: Eine kleine Oase zum wohlfühlen außerhalb des Trubels von der Altstadt
reviews.positives:
Sehr sauber
Sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit
Top Service egal bei welchem Anliegen
Haben es auch möglich gemacht das wir früher einchecken konnten, da wir schon früh morgens eintrafen 
Die. Betten auch sehr gut, nicht hart wie sonst in Vietnam oft  vorzufinden
Die Lage nahe der Altstadt und trotzdem nachts sehr ruhig
reviews.negatives: Für uns war alles top, nichts zu beanstanden, jederzeit gerne wieder… absolut empfehlenswert
